title: The Geneva Conventions Act, 1960
full_text: The Geneva Conventions Act, 1960 जिनेवा कन्‍वेंशन अधिनियम, 1960 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196006 Act Number: 06 Enactment Date: 1960-03-12 Act Year: 1960 Short Title: The Geneva Conventions Act, 1960 Hindi Title: जिनेवा कन्‍वेंशन अधिनियम, 1960 Long Title: An Act to enable effect to be given to certain international Conventions done at Geneva on the twelfth day of August, 1949, to which India is a party, and for purposes connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 14-08-1961 Notification: 14th August, 1961, vide notification No. S.R.O. 222(E), dated 2nd August, 1961, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 4(ii). Last Updated: 01-04-2019 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. THE THIRD SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4. THE FOURTH SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Geneva Conventions Act, 1960 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II PUNISHMENT OF OFFENDERS AGAINST CONVENTIONS CHAPTER III LEGAL PROCEEDINGS IN RESPECT OF PROTECTED PERSONS CHAPTER IV ABUSE OF THE RED CROSS AND OTHER EMBLEMS CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Punishment of grave breaches of conventions. Section 4. Liability of persons for offences committed outside India. Section 5. Jurisdiction of court. Section 6. Proof of application of Convention. Section 7. Jurisdiction of courts martial. Section 8. Notice of trial of protected persons to be served on protecting power, etc. Section 9. Legal re-presentation of certain persons. Section 10. Appeals by protected prisoners of war and internees. Section 11. Reduction of sentence and custody of protected prisoners of war and internees. Section 12. Prohibition of use of Red Cross and other emblems. Section 13. Penalty. Section 14. Offences by companies. Section 15. Saving. Section 16. Use of „Red Cross‟ and other emblems on Indian ship or aircraft. Section 17. Cognizance of offences. Section 18. Power to make rules. Section 19. Rules to be laid before Parliament. Section 20. Repeal. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3.
